title: Wallet Admin Adjustment Request
description: POST /api/v1/billing/wallet/admin-adjustments — privileged manual wallet correction. additionalProperties:true (admin payload varies by adjustment kind).

amount_usd.description: Adjustment amount in USD (number or decimal string). String branch must be a signed decimal with at most 6 fractional digits; number branch bounded to +/-1,000,000.

balance_delta_usd.description: Direct balance delta in USD (number or decimal string). String branch must be a signed decimal with at most 6 fractional digits; number branch bounded to +/-1,000,000.

debt_writeoff_usd.description: Debt write-off amount in USD (number or decimal string). String branch must be a signed decimal with at most 6 fractional digits; number branch bounded to +/-1,000,000.

write_off_debt.description: Whether to write off outstanding debt.

resolve_dispute.description: Whether this adjustment resolves a dispute.
